description: Photo editor with powerful image editing tools.

description: Qt multimedia player with extra features (CSS themes, YouTube integration, etc.) based on mpv. It can use MPlayer as alternative backend.

name: Snd
description: Advanced sound editor modeled loosely after Emacs.

name: sndfile-info
description: Obtaining information about the contents of an audio file.

name: SongRec
description: Unofficial Shazam client to recognize audio from an arbitrary audio file or from the microphone, written in Rust.

name: Sonic Visualiser
description: Viewing, analyzing, and annotating the contents of music audio files.

name: SonoBus
description: Application for streaming high-quality, low-latency peer-to-peer audio between devices over the internet or a local network.

name: SoundConverter
description: A graphical application to convert audio files into different formats.

name: SoX
description: Command line utility that can convert various formats of computer audio files into other formats.

name: SpectMorph
description: Analyze samples of musical instruments and combine them (morphing).

name: Spotify
description: Proprietary music streaming service that supports local playback and streaming.

name: Stopmotion
description: Application to create stop-motion animations. It helps you capture and edit the frames of your animation and export them as a single file.

name: Strawberry
description: Fork of Clementine aimed at audio enthusiasts and music collectors. Uses Qt6.

name: Subtitle Composer
description: Subtitle editor for KDE supporting various formats, features different player backends, able to display wave form.

name: Subtitle Edit
description: Subtitle editing program. Written in C# using mono.

name: SuperCollider
description: Platform for audio synthesis and algorithmic composition, used by musicians, artists, and researchers working with sound.

name: Surge XT
description: Cross platform, subtractive hybrid synthesizer. Installs the standalone application (surge-xt-standalone), plugins (surge-xt-clap, surge-xt-vst3), and common files (surge-xt-common).

name: Swappy
description: Wayland native image annotation tool.

name: Sweet Home 3D
description: Interior design software application for the planning and development of floor plans

name: Switcheroo
description: Convert between different image filetypes and resize them easily.

name: sxiv
description: Simple image viewer based on imlib2 that works well with tiling window managers.

name: Synfig Studio
description: 2D animation software, designed as powerful industrial-strength solution for creating film-quality animation using a vector and bitmap artwork.

name: Tagutil
description: CLI tool to edit music file's tag. It aims to provide both an easy-to-script interface and ease of use interactively.

name: Tauon Music Box
description: Modern, comfortable and streamlined music player for the playback of your music collection.

name: Tellico
description: KDE application for organizing various collections (books, video, music, coins, etc.).

name: Telly Skout
description: Convergent TV guide based on Kirigami.

name: Thunar Media Tags Plugin
description: Adds special features for media files to the Thunar File Manager, including the ability to edit tags.

name: timg
description: Terminal Image and Video Viewer.

name: TiMidity++
description: Software synthesizer, which can play MIDI files by converting them into PCM waveform data.

name: Totem
description: Media player (audio and video) for the GNOME desktop that uses GStreamer.

name: Transmageddon
description: Simple python application for transcoding video into formats supported by GStreamer.

name: tvtime
description: High quality television application for use with video capture cards.

name: Universal Media Server
description: UPnP media server, which is capable of sharing video, audio and images between most modern devices. (Fork of PS3 Media Server.)

name: upmpdcli
description: UPnP Media Renderer front-end for Music Player Daemon that interacts with internal streaming services like Gerbera or external streaming services including Internet radio, Tidal, Qobuz, Subsonic; through a control point like upplay and various mobile apps like Linn Kazoo.

name: v4l-utils
description: Provides a series of utilities for media devices.

name: v4l2loopback
description: Kernel module that allows to create virtual video (v4l2) devices. This can be used to create virtual webcams with video passed by programs like FFmpeg.

name: Vee One Suite
description: Old-school software instruments: synthv1, a polyphonic subtractive synthesizer; samplv1, a polyphonic sampler synthesizer; drumkv1, yet another drum-kit sampler; padthv1, a polyphonic additive synthesizer.

name: Video Trimmer
description: Cut out a fragment of a video given the start and end timestamps. The video is never re-encoded, so the process is very fast and does not reduce the video quality.

name: Viewnior
description: Minimalistic GTK image viewer featuring support for flipping, rotating, animations and configurable mouse actions.

name: Vimiv
description: An image viewer with vim-like keybindings. It is written in python3 using the Gtk3 toolkit.

name: VLC media player
description: Command-line version of the famous video player that can play smoothly high definition videos in the TTY. The rc interface can be launched with vlc -I rc, and the ncurses interface can be launched with vlc -I ncurses.

name: VLC media player
description: Middleweight video player with support for a wide variety of audio and video formats.

name: VMPK
description: Virtual MIDI Piano Keyboard. MIDI events generator and receiver. It can use midi SoundFonts to generate sound by itself, or can be used to drive a MIDI synthesizer.

name: Volume Icon
description: Another volume control for your system tray with channel selection, themes and an external mixer.

name: Vvave
description: Tiny Qt music player to keep your favorite songs at hand. Part of maui.

name: Webcamoid
description: Full featured webcam suite.

name: Wings 3D
description: Advanced subdivision modeler that is both powerful and easy to use.

name: xcolor
description: Lightweight color picker for X11.

name: xine
description: Free multimedia player.

name: Xjadeo
description: Video player that displays a video-clip in sync with an external time source (MTC, LTC, JACK-transport).

name: Xloadimage
description: Classic X image viewer.

name: XMMS2
description: Complete rewrite of the popular music player.

name: xwax
description: Digital Vinyl System (DVS) for Linux. It allows DJs and turntablists to playback digital audio files (MP3, Ogg Vorbis, FLAC, AAC and more), controlled using a normal pair of turntables via timecoded vinyls.

name: Yoshimi
description: Software synthesizer, a fork of ZynAddSubFX.

name: zopflipng
description: Highly efficient PNG optimisation tool using Google's zopfli library

name: Zrythm
description: A feature-rich digital audio workstation with support for various plugin formats and advanced audio processing capabilities.

name: ZynAddSubFX
description: Fully featured software synthesizer capable of making a countless number of instruments, from some common heard from expensive hardware to interesting sounds that you will boost to an amazing universe of sounds.
